sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n50115" key="i(erouli/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἱερο-υλίζω</orth>, of wine, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τὸν παλαιὸν καὶ ἱερουλίζοντα</foreign> dub. sens. in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0744.tlg001:10" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alex.Trall.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
